finding_results.evidence: Remaining 'which was/is/meant' appositional chains: 4 total — chapters/chapter_05.md:83 ('which was the first honest answer…and which had ended the marriage', 2 instances) and chapters/chapter_05.md:159 ('which is to say inevitably, which is to say without anyone deciding to', 2 instances). Remaining 'the way [clause]' similes: 2 total — chapters/chapter_05.md:9 ('the way a person understands each ingredient on a menu') and chapters/chapter_05.md:135 ('the way a person moves through a dark room with their hands out'). Eliminated instances at former lines 5, 7, 37, 43, 45, 49, 51, 59, 65, 83 ('in the way that'), 91, 97, 99, 115, 135 (two 'the way' constructions), 137 (three 'the way' constructions), 155, 157 ('the way water moves'), 161 (three 'which was' chains), 175. Replacement constructions include em-dash apposition (chapters/chapter_05.md:5, 7, 37, 49, 59, 99), full-stop new sentence (chapters/chapter_05.md:51, 115), colon introducing list (chapters/chapter_05.md:43), and simple apposition without relative pronoun (chapters/chapter_05.md:65).
finding_results.notes: Gary's 'which goes into an account' at chapters/chapter_05.md:113 retained as a standard non-restrictive relative clause providing factual information, distinct from the appositional-reinterpretation pattern targeted by the finding. The two 'which' instances in the AI response paragraph (chapters/chapter_05.md:127) are AI-generated prose and left as-is.

finding_results.evidence: Transparency Portal scene comic moments: (1) chapters/chapter_05.md:129 — 'Was this information helpful?' feedback prompt with thumbs-up/thumbs-down buttons, linked to the grain-bowl rating interface for bathetic contrast; (2) chapters/chapter_05.md:137 — Dan uncapping a pen from 'twenty years of meetings, find the actionable item, bring it to the next room,' starting a list that produces three definitions and a dent where the pen pressed without moving. Bar scene sardonic Gary: (1) chapters/chapter_05.md:173 — 'You're a mammal. Used to be that was enough.' (sardonic, comic, devastating in equal measure); (2) chapters/chapter_05.md:181 — 'Welcome to the show, Kessler.' (sardonic callback to 'dog at a magic show' from cafeteria scene at chapters/chapter_05.md:103). Additional sardonic texture: Gary pretending to half-forget Michigan at chapters/chapter_05.md:173, peeling a label strip at chapters/chapter_05.md:169. The laugh description at chapters/chapter_05.md:179 reworked to be more compressed, ending with 'relieved to have company and sorry about the terms.'
finding_results.notes: Comic moments in both scenes coexist with emotional devastation rather than displacing it. The 'Was this helpful?' beat lands as absurd precisely because the response is incomprehensible. The pen/legal-pad beat is comic through the muscle memory of competence firing on the unknowable. Gary's sardonic lines maintain his profile ('dry observation delivered in a flat register') while adding comic DNA the original solemn register lacked.

finding_results.evidence: Cognitive-insufficiency insight stated as clear proposition exactly twice: (1) chapters/chapter_05.md:135 — 'the static was not noise but signal, signal his brain wasn't built to receive'; (2) chapters/chapter_05.md:141 — 'It was a problem he lacked the cognitive architecture to formulate.' Former third restatement (distance metaphor at old line 135) replaced with embodied experience at chapters/chapter_05.md:137: pen uncapped, legal pad, three definitions written, cooling system thrum, apple-eating colleague, pen dent. Former fourth restatement (old line 139, 'parse syntactically/assemble semantically/different kind of machine') trimmed to end at 'completely accessible' with emotional landing preserved. Dan's spoken version at chapters/chapter_05.md:167 revised from tripartite thesis ('It can't be translated…It can't be simplified…It can't be explained') to frustrated circling speech: false starts ('and they also —', 'I could almost —'), hedging ('I mean'), repetition under pressure ('right there…right there'), trailing off ('my brain doesn't have the right —'), and a final formulation that sounds struggled-toward rather than delivered: 'I'm not the right kind of machine.'
finding_results.notes: Dan's dialogue version at chapters/chapter_05.md:167 now sounds like a man at a bar trying to articulate something that resists articulation, consistent with his syntax_signature ('medium-length sentences with qualifications and false starts') and stress_tells ('repeats himself under pressure, circling back'). The intervening material between the two retained insight statements uses physical sensation (hum, armrests, apple crunch), observed detail (legal pad, pen dent), and struggled action (parsing attempt that seizes) rather than metaphorical restatement.

finding_results.evidence: Gary's profanity now appears in 5 speaking turns distributed across both scenes: chapters/chapter_05.md:81 ('shit sandwich'), chapters/chapter_05.md:91 ('Hell'), chapters/chapter_05.md:99 ('bilateral-node shit'), chapters/chapter_05.md:113 ('I sign shit'), chapters/chapter_05.md:173 ('goddamn enough'). Lunch scene: 4 turns (lines 81, 91, 99, 113). Bar scene: 1 turn (line 173). All instances are ambient speech texture consistent with Gary's 'casual and constant' profanity profile. No instance draws narrative attention or functions as dramatic emphasis.
finding_results.notes: Changed 'I sign stuff' to 'I sign shit' at line 113 and 'Used to be that was enough' to 'Used to be that was goddamn enough' at line 173. The original text also contained profanity at lines 81, 91, and 99 that the finding analysis had partially undercounted (finding cited only line 81). With the two additions, Gary's profanity is distributed across both major dialogue scenes and reads as unremarkable ambient texture, preventing the 'wise mentor' drift the finding identified. Full dialogue audit confirmed: contraction levels are character-true for all speakers (Dan high, Gary high, Beth moderate-appropriate for facilitator role), no anti-transcript violations, leverage shifts present in both dialogue scenes, no style bible example lines appear verbatim, and no continuity contradictions were introduced.

finding_results.evidence: chapters/chapter_05.md:27 (Keith bow-tie: negation scaffold replaced with direct interpretive clause 'which Dan had come to read... as a small daily act of insistence'), chapters/chapter_05.md:57 (Beth conviction: 'Not the forced conviction... but something more unsettling' replaced with 'the worn-smooth conviction'), chapters/chapter_05.md:177 (Gary silence: 'not his conversational quiet... but the other quiet' replaced with 'deeper than his usual deadpan, the rare quiet'), chapters/chapter_05.md:179 (laugh: 'not loud and not unkind' replaced with 'a short sound, low, from the chest'). Three instances retained: chapters/chapter_05.md:39 (hand-washing, thematic), chapters/chapter_05.md:83 (not crying, not drunk, just sitting — Gary's divorce story), chapters/chapter_05.md:141 (not as suspicion but as fact — cognitive architecture climax). Retained instances in non-adjacent sections (section 1, section 3, section 4).
finding_results.notes: Reduced from 7 to 3 instances. The 4 removed instances were replaced with direct description that delivers the same insight without the negation-correction scaffold. Retained instances carry the strongest thematic weight: the hand-washing ritual (embodied coping), the divorce-floor moment (Gary's backstory pivot), and the suspicion-to-fact shift (chapter's epistemological climax).

finding_results.evidence: chapters/chapter_05.md:5 (Timmins: arrives through action — 'was already filling a legal pad, his pen moving in strokes so small Dan couldn't read them from a foot away' — no interpretive gloss), chapters/chapter_05.md:5 (Park: minimal name-only intro, then arrives through dialogue and action at chapters/chapter_05.md:15 — thermos-as-prop revealed in scene rather than pre-announced), chapters/chapter_05.md:49 (Oliver Shaw: coffee stain presented as unglossed physical observation — 'as if the stain were evidence of a crime he hadn't meant to commit' removed), chapters/chapter_05.md:163 (Phil: reduced from 3 strokes to 2 — Mets tattoo dropped, introduced through lazy eye and action of watching game). Biographical-footnote intros preserved for Keith (chapters/chapter_05.md:27), Beth (chapters/chapter_05.md:45), Gary (chapters/chapter_05.md:65) — 3 total, under 4-max.
finding_results.notes: Three structurally distinct introduction methods now deployed: action (Timmins writing before the meeting starts), dialogue (Park's question at line 15 serves as her real characterization moment, with the thermos-prop reveal landing harder because it's discovered in scene rather than pre-narrated), and unglossed physical observation (Oliver's coffee stain stands alone without the crime metaphor). Phil reduced from three biographical strokes to two action-oriented details. Park's revision has a secondary craft benefit: removing the thermos detail from line 5 lets the prop-reveal at line 15 land as fresh discovery rather than confirmation of something already narrated.

finding_results.evidence: chapters/chapter_05.md:183 (catalogue of Beth's font, Keith's tie, Park's thermos, Oliver's stain, Gary's Tupperware replaced with single sustained physical moment: label-smoothing and card pressing against ribs). chapters/chapter_05.md:183 (thematic summary 'He was the interface. He was the face. He was the warm body in the chair...' removed entirely). chapters/chapter_05.md:185 (final paragraph retained — 'his presence was his contribution' functions as ironic card-text echo embedded in sensory flow, not narrator summary). Final 3 paragraphs contain 1 callback (Beth's card at chapters/chapter_05.md:183). No roll call. No theme stated in summary form.
finding_results.notes: The penultimate paragraph now ends on two physical gestures: Dan smoothing a label corner and the card catching against his ribs. The phrase 'and he left it there' closes the gesture with a note of quiet acceptance that does the thematic work the catalogue and interface-declaration previously did explicitly. The chapter's accumulated details (bow tie, thermos, coffee stain, Tupperware) remain in their original scene contexts where they were earned; they no longer need to be inventoried at the exit. The final paragraph's 'his presence was his contribution' now reads as an echo of the card text rather than a narrator thesis, because the preceding catalogue that framed it as summary has been removed.

pass_summaries.summary: All three findings addressed. ch05_f01 (HIGH): 'which was/is/meant' appositional chains reduced from 17+ to 4; 'the way [clause]' similes reduced from 7+ to 2; replacements use em-dash apposition, full-stop new sentences, colon lists, and simple apposition for syntactic variety. ch05_f04 (MEDIUM): Two comic moments added to Transparency Portal scene (feedback-prompt absurdity, pen-reflex muscle memory); two sardonic Gary lines added to bar scene ('You're a mammal' and 'Welcome to the show, Kessler'), replacing solemn register while maintaining emotional weight. ch05_f05 (MEDIUM): Cognitive-insufficiency insight consolidated from 4 statements to 2 (signal/static and cognitive architecture); intervening material replaced with embodied physical detail; Dan's spoken version to Gary reworked as frustrated circling speech rather than clean tripartite formulation. Heading contract preserved. Character voice signatures maintained per style bible. No continuity contradictions introduced.

Addressed finding ch05_f07 by adding two instances of Gary's casual profanity: 'I sign shit' (lunch scene, line 113) and 'goddamn enough' (bar scene, line 173). Combined with three pre-existing instances (lines 81, 91, 99), Gary now uses profanity in 5 of his approximately 17 speaking turns, distributed across both the lunch and bar scenes. All profanity is ambient speech texture consistent with his style bible profile ('casual and constant'), avoiding narrative emphasis or dramatic punctuation. Broader dialogue audit found no additional idiolect, cadence, contraction, or anti-transcript issues requiring correction. Heading contract preserved. No continuity violations introduced.

All 3 findings addressed. The 'not X but Y' construction reduced from 7 to 3 instances by replacing negation-correction scaffolds with direct description (ch05_f02). Minor-character introductions now use 3 structurally distinct methods — action, dialogue, and unglossed observation — breaking the biographical-footnote template (ch05_f03). The chapter ending's character catalogue and explicit theme statement replaced with a single sustained physical image: label-smoothing and the card against Dan's ribs (ch05_f06). Additional copyedit: removed one instance of 'specific' (line 13) to reduce lexical-signature recurrence below the tic threshold. Heading contract preserved. Dialogue contraction levels verified against style bible (Dan: high, Gary: high). No continuity contradictions introduced — Gary's age (53), proxy assignments, building floor numbers, and seasonal references all verified against continuity sheet. No sanitization introduced; the chapter's comic-devastating register is maintained at full force.

summary: Merged three-pass revision report (FIXED=7, PARTIAL=0, UNRESOLVED=0).
